name: Chocolate-Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, combine the butter and 1 1/4 cups granulated sugar. Beat until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg yolk and vanilla; continue beating until combined.
3. Gradually add buttermilk and pureed bananas, mixing well after each addition.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the batter until very smooth.
6. Beat the egg whites in a clean bowl until foamy. Gradually add 1/2 cup granulated sugar, continuing to beat until the mixture is soft and moist but still holds peaks.
7. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter using a spatula.
8. Grease and lightly flour a 9-inch square cake pan. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the surface with a spatula.
9. Bake in the center of the oven at 350°F until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 1 hour.
10. Allow the cake to cool on a rack for at least 30 minutes before serving.
11. Dust with powdered sugar just before serving for best flavor and texture.
This recipe yields 8 servings.
